Defines shared resource definitions for PRF and Normal FW, including images and fonts.

# Purpose
The JSON file defines a set of shared resource definitions used by both PRF and Normal FW systems. It specifies the `versionDefName` as `SYSTEM_RESOURCE_VERSION` and includes a list of media resources. Each media resource is described by its `type`, `name`, and `file` path, indicating the location of the resource file. The resources include images in various formats such as `pbi8`, `pdc`, and `png`, as well as font files in `pbf` format. Some font resources have additional attributes like `builtin` and `compatibility`, which provide further details about their usage and compatibility requirements.
